languages.text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

traits.locale_text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

languages.text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.
languages.original_text: Врата дворца заперты, а значит, Ювенна не сможет действовать решительно. Нужно узнать литанию врат или найти иной способ открыть их.

traits.locale_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.
The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.
The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

languages.text: Las puertas de palacio están cerradas, por lo que Juvenna no puede tomar una acción decisiva. La solución pasa por descubrir la letanía de las puertas u otra forma de abrirlas.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: Las puertas de palacio están cerradas, por lo que Juvenna no puede tomar una acción decisiva. La solución pasa por descubrir la letanía de las puertas u otra forma de abrirlas.

languages.text: 宫殿大门紧锁，这意味着尤文娜无法采取决定性行动。解决办法是找到开启大门的祷文，或另寻他法开门。
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: 宫殿大门紧锁，这意味着尤文娜无法采取决定性行动。解决办法是找到开启大门的祷文，或另寻他法开门。

languages.text: Les portes du palais sont verrouillées : Juvenna ne peut pas agir pour l'instant. Il faut apprendre la litanie des portes ou trouver un autre moyen de les ouvrir.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: Les portes du palais sont verrouillées : Juvenna ne peut pas agir pour l'instant. Il faut apprendre la litanie des portes ou trouver un autre moyen de les ouvrir.

languages.text: Saray kapıları kilitli, bu da Juvenna'nın kararlı bir eylemde bulunamayacağı anlamına geliyor. Çözüm, kapı ilahisini öğrenmek veya onları açmanın başka bir yolunu bulmak.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: Saray kapıları kilitli, bu da Juvenna'nın kararlı bir eylemde bulunamayacağı anlamına geliyor. Çözüm, kapı ilahisini öğrenmek veya onları açmanın başka bir yolunu bulmak.

languages.text: 宮の門は鍵がかかっており、ジュベナは決断を下せない。解決策は、門の呪文を覚えるか、別の方法で門を開くことである。
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: 宮の門は鍵がかかっており、ジュベナは決断を下せない。解決策は、門の呪文を覚えるか、別の方法で門を開くことである。

languages.text: Da die Tore des Palastes versperrt sind, kann Juvenna nichts unternehmen. Du brauchst also die Torlitanei oder musst einen anderen Weg finden, sie zu öffnen.
languages.original_text: The palace gates are locked, which means Juvenna cannot take decisive action. The solution is to learn the gate litany or find another way to open them.

traits.locale_text: Da die Tore des Palastes versperrt sind, kann Juvenna nichts unternehmen. Du brauchst also die Torlitanei oder musst einen anderen Weg finden, sie zu öffnen.
